reviews.review_description:
I put a code and I forgot it and it’s like the best game 
Can’t use it no more ￼￼

I was looking for something to play for my kids. and this is the top for its money. the child played without a break until the glasses did not discharge. I decided to check it out and immersed myself. very beautiful pleasant graphics.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you so much for the 5 stars! Glad to see that you and your kids liked the game! We will introduce new update with new mechanics soon!

reviews.review_description: I played and had fun. I gave it to my children to play - they actually laughed while playing this game))

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you so much for the 5 stars! Glad to see you liked the game! We are already working on the update, new mechanics will be available soon!

reviews.review_description: The game has lots of combinations and craft items to make, haven't tried them all yet!

reviews.review_description: An interesting and unusual game. Looking forward to the next updates
